arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers insists Celtic are ready for exhausting workload but reveals the big festive miss he used to LOVE
arts.sum: No winter break for the first time in four years means the Hoops face a draining run of fixtures at home and abroad.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor lays out how Celtic plan to overcome 'hurt' of Dundee United stalemate
arts.sum: Speaking after Celtic’s draw with Dundee United, McGregor has urged his side to harness the ‘hurt’ they experienced at Tannadice when they face Motherwell on Boxing Day. Celtic face Motherwell tomorrow after a frustrating draw against Dundee United that was an encounter to forget from the Bhoys’ perspective.

arts.ttl: Celtic's three best players of 2024, with Daizen Maeda making the cut
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers returned to Celtic last summer, and won the double, including that incredible late Scottish Cup final win over Rangers in May. When the previous campaign concluded, Celtic fans were unsure of Nicolas Kuhn, but he has looked and played like a different animal this season.

arts.ttl: Where Luke McCowan and Arne Engels rank as all of Brendan Rodgers' 2024 Celtic signings are rated
arts.sum: Competing with Reo Hatate, Luke McCowan and Arne Engels for a starting spot, the Portugal U21 captain has scored three goals and created two assists so far this season. So here, 67 Hail Hail takes a look at all of Rodgers’ signings in 2024 which includes the work the Celtic boss did in the January window that helped the Hoops get off to a storming start this season.

Two of the Scottish Premiership's top four teams meet in Glasgow's east end as league leaders Celtic host Motherwell at Parkhead in their festive fixture. Another Scottish side hadn't shut out Celtic...

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Motherwell: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Celtic take on Motherwell tomorrow and the reigning Scottish Premiership will be keen to get back to winning ways after a stalemate at Dundee United in their last away match of 2024. Celtic vs Motherwell kick-off time

arts.ttl: Desperate star offers Celtic hope of £7m Christmas present that could unlock Tierney return – Parkhead news bulletin
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei is said to be 'desperate' to ditch Celtic for good - and that could be music to Brendan Rodgers' ears

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers outlines where Celtic plan to improve ahead of Motherwell clash
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of the clash, Rodgers made clear that he wants his Celtic side to be more ‘clinical’ against Motherwell to avoid a repeat scenario of their draw with Dundee United. Brendan Rodgers on Celtic’s Boxing Day clash vs Motherwell

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor shares hope Celtic will add 'a few new faces' in the January transfer window
arts.sum: “Like I said, come January we might have a few new faces in and that’ll push the group even further and the squad will get stronger. We’ll see what happens, but it’s always good to have new faces to push everyone as well.”

arts.ttl: 5 things every Celtic fan wants for Christmas - including Kieran Tierney in a pear tree
arts.sum: The Hoops have dominated Scottish football over the best part of the decade but the green-and-white faithful are hungry for more
